summary: Comprehensive M1 integration test suite covers all optimizations. All 12 tests pass, covering full-attention decode, linear-attention (DeltaNet GPU) decode, hybrid decode, multi-step decode, skip_rmsnorm wiring, launch count verification, and prefill non-regression.

notes: Integration test uses toy model configs to avoid loading full 27B weights on the test GPU.
Correctness vs numpy reference: max_err=3.4981e-03 for the full decode path (within 1e-2 tolerance for INT4 accumulation).
VAL-CROSS-001: Full decode pass through hybrid layers (linear + full attention) verified.
VAL-CROSS-007: Prefill + 3 decode steps all produce finite outputs.
Reproducibility test (max_err=1.53e-05 between runs) confirms determinism within atomicAdd non-determinism tolerance.
Test properly exercises both full_attention and linear_attention layer types.
12 tests cover all M1 features end-to-end.
Tests are well-structured and targeted to specific assertions.
M1 vs numpy reference test (3.4981e-03) provides confidence that fused kernels maintain numerical accuracy.
